title: Design Engineer (Electrical)
description:
**Job Responsibilities**

* Prepare technical drawings using AutoCAD 2015 and the company’s in-house software, including single line diagrams, connection schematics, and basic mechanical detail drawings.

* Work closely with project teams, contractors, and suppliers to clarify design requirements and resolve technical queries.

* Ensure all drawings are precise, well-presented, and compliant with project specifications, relevant codes, and industry standards.

* Coordinate with engineers, architects, and project managers in the development and refinement of design concepts.

* Maintain, organise, and update drawing databases, libraries, and project documentation.

* Review drawings to verify accuracy, completeness, and conformity with technical specifications.

* Provide support to the engineering and architectural teams during design presentations and proposal preparations.

* Ensure all work adheres to safety guidelines, regulatory requirements, and professional standards.

**Job Requirements**

* Minimum Diploma in Electrical Engineering, or ITE / NITEC in Electrical Technology, or an equivalent qualification.

* Preferably 1–2 years of relevant working experience in the marine industry.

* Proficient in computer applications including AutoCAD (2D/3D), Windows, Microsoft Word, and Excel.

* Possess sound electrical and technical knowledge, particularly related to marine systems.

* Basic understanding of Electrical or Electronic Engineering principles.

* Strong skills in technical drafting, detailing, and familiarity with materials and technical specifications.

* Able to work efficiently under tight timelines with minimal supervision.

* Highly motivated with a positive and responsible work attitude.

* Ability to produce sketches will be an added advantage.

* Strong team player with good collaboration skills.
